page_metadata.biotools__summary: An R package for identifying and quantifying de novo continuous regions of transcription across the genome. The package uses ChIP-seq data of histone modifications that mark active Transcription Start Sites (TSSs) to divide closely spaced transcripts into individually transcriped units.
